title: Author AbilityFleetTopologyReport typed shape + CLI — computed (agent × ability) matrix diagnostics
description:
Per [[agent-abilities-pokemon-mechanics-with-topology-2026-05-26]]. The substrate-quantifiable answer to 'is this agent over/under-equipped?' Typed shape computed from the per-agent AgentCapabilityCatalog files across the substrate. Outputs: per-agent count + classification distribution; per-ability coverage (how many agents hold it); fleet-wide aggregates (total abilities tracked, coverage gaps, concentration-risk SPOFs, near-ubiquitous candidates for substrate-share promotion); typed warnings (over-equipped vs fleet median, under-equipped, archetype-mismatch acquisitions). Modeled on the existing `roster analyze` pattern which already does this at the role layer (Specialists / Core Roles / Fleet Baseline). Implementation: typed Codable struct + a CLI (probably `swift-ability-topology-cli` under wrkstrm-core) that consumes all agent CapabilityCatalog files and emits the report. NO hard caps per operator doctrine — diagnostics only.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- AgentCapabilityCatalog (this cohort) — aggregates across agents
- (no direct cost-type composition — pure topology report; cost-aware version is a future expansion)
